'''鈭歬-ch-s-l''' ('''kakachseloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ambitionize|ambitionize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ambitionize|ambitionize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-ch-s-l
|-
! Lemma
| kakachseloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikachseloko|thikachseloko]] || [[word:jikachseloko|jikachseloko]] || [[word:shikachseloko|shikachseloko]] || [[word:kikachseloko|kikachseloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukachseloko|thuthukachseloko]] || [[word:jujukachseloko|jujukachseloko]] || [[word:shushukachseloko|shushukachseloko]] || [[word:kukukachseloko|kukukachseloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokachseloko|thothokachseloko]] || [[word:jojokachseloko|jojokachseloko]] || [[word:shoshokachseloko|shoshokachseloko]] || [[word:kokokachseloko|kokokachseloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokachseloko|thokachseloko]] || [[word:jokachseloko|jokachseloko]] || [[word:shokachseloko|shokachseloko]] || [[word:kokachseloko|kokachseloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokachseloko|thokachseloko]] || [[word:jokachseloko|jokachseloko]] || [[word:shokachseloko|shokachseloko]] || [[word:kokachseloko|kokachseloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kachseloko|th忙kachseloko]] || [[word:j忙kachseloko|j忙kachseloko]] || [[word:sh忙kachseloko|sh忙kachseloko]] || [[word:k忙kachseloko|k忙kachseloko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakachseloko|thakachseloko]] || [[word:jakachseloko|jakachseloko]] || [[word:shakachseloko|shakachseloko]] || [[word:kakachseloko|kakachseloko]]
|}
